note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerex. Meas 2.4x0.5x0.8cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 42% gran, 58% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Nguyen notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.4 cm x 0.5 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 67% slough, 33% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Debridement consult ordered.
